exam_format: Computer-based testing (CBT), fixed-form. 100-150 questions depending on exam. Scaled scoring (390 passing out of 500).

testing_centers.provider: PSI or NHA-approved test centers / online proctoring
testing_centers.notes: Most exams are computer-based (linear fixed-form). Some available via live remote proctoring. NCCA accredited. Results often immediate or within days.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required at check-in. Must match name on registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed book. No notes, phones, or reference materials. Calculators provided on-screen if needed. Follow all test center or remote proctoring rules.
renewal_options: Every 2 years via online portal. Requires 10 continuing education (CE) credits per cycle. CE can be earned through NHA courses or approved providers. Renewal fee applies.
recommended_experience: Possess a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency; or are scheduled to earn a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency in the next 12 months. Completed a medical assistant training or education program within the last 5 years OR possess a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency with 1 year of supervised work experience in a medical assisting field within the last 3 years OR 2 years of supervised work experience in a medical assisting field within the last 5 years.

prerequisites.description: Possess a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency; or are scheduled to earn a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency in the next 12 months

Completed a medical assistant training or education program within the last 5 years OR possess a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency with 1 year of supervised work experience in a medical assisting field within the last 3 years OR 2 years of supervised work experience in a medical assisting field within the last 5 years

retake_policy.notes: Full exam fee charged for each retake. No limit specified beyond waiting period.

official_study_resources.title: CCMA Online Study Guide
official_study_resources.notes: This engaging online study guide provides contemporary learning tools such as interactive games, quizzes, flashcards, and professionalism tips from experts in the field.

official_study_resources.title: CCMA Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Prepare for your CCMA certification exam with a set of three different online practice tests. Each medical assistant practice test allows up to 2 attempts each.

official_study_resources.title: CCMA Preparation Package
official_study_resources.notes: This special package includes robust interactive study materials and a medical assistant study guide, along with the clinical medical assistant practice test.

official_study_resources.title: CCMA Test Plan
official_study_resources.notes: This free study aide maps out key concepts you will see on the CCMA exam.
